title: Childhood incident asthma and traffic-related air pollution at home and school.
ehr_evidence: The study uses a recruited cohort (Southern California Children’s Health Study) with continuous monitoring and physician diagnosis, rather than an EHR database.
summary: A prospective longitudinal study evaluating the effects of traffic-related air pollution at home and school on the development of new-onset asthma in children.
key_findings: Results are not provided in the manuscript snippet.
population: School children in kindergarten and first grade
limitations: Results are not included in the provided text snippet.
